plugins.name: feature-definition
plugins.description: Turn unstructured feature ideas into a precise requirements table through structured brainstorming. Output feeds directly into the feature-development plugin.

plugins.name: feature-development
plugins.description: Build new product features with a strict development workflow that is anchored on test-driven acceptance and disciplined coding practices.

plugins.name: roadmap
plugins.description: Organise defined feature requirements into a sequenced, release-grouped roadmap and communicate it in user-benefit terms.

plugins.name: debugging
plugins.description: Investigate code and trace changes back through git history to their original requirements.

plugins.name: documentation
plugins.description: Write user-facing changelog entries from PRs and requirements files.

plugins.name: legal
plugins.description: Trademark conflict research and regulatory compliance assessment for software products. Covers naming risks, GDPR, US state privacy laws, and other applicable frameworks.

plugins.name: marketing
plugins.description: Build user-focused marketing websites, topic-specific landing pages, and get SEO/GEO recommendations for software products.

metadata.description: A suite of plugins to help product managers build and realease new features.
